stem: A batch of fruit yogurt parfait consists of 3 cups of yogurt and 4 strawberries and has 802 milligrams (mg) of vitamin C. There are 250 mg of vitamin C in 1 cup of the yogurt used to make this batch of parfaits. How much vitamin C, in mg, is in 1 strawberry?
rationale: Let s be the milligrams of vitamin C in one strawberry. Then 3 × 250 + 4s = 802, so 750 + 4s = 802 and 4s = 52, giving s = 13. Choice B is correct.
